description.value: Codes that classify human-readable process notes included in adjudication related artifacts (such as ClaimResponse, ExplanationOfBenefit, and PaymentReconciliation). These codes distinguish the intent and role of the note, such as disclaimers, adjudication explanations, conditional information, or other contextual guidance.

copyright.value: This material derives from the HL7 Terminology (THO). THO is copyright ©1989+ Health Level Seven International and is made available under the CC0 designation. For more licensing information see: https://terminology.hl7.org/license

definition.value: Indicates a process note that communicates a disclaimer, limitation, or caution regarding the estimate, adjudication, or related information.
Indicates a process note that describes, explains, or clarifies adjudication results in human-readable form.

Indicates a process note describing conditional factors or assumptions relevant to the estimate or adjudication that are not otherwise fully represented in structured data, including conditions supplementary to medical management or prior authorization information.
Indicates a process note whose type does not fall within another defined category.
Indicates a process note providing payer-specific explanatory or contextual information relevant to the estimate or adjudication.
Indicates a process note providing provider-supplied explanatory or contextual information relevant to the estimate or adjudication.
Indicates a process note explaining benefit coverage, limitations, exclusions, or member cost-sharing considerations relevant to the estimate or adjudication.
Indicates a process note explaining pricing assumptions, negotiated rates, network considerations, or other pricing-related factors relevant to the estimate or adjudication.
Indicates a process note that communicates a follow-up action, recommendation, or next step for the member, provider, or payer.
Indicates a general informational process note that provides contextual information but is not primarily a disclaimer, adjudication explanation, or conditional note.
